query: SELECT i.invoice_number, ii.position, ii.description, ii.is_optional, ii.line_total_net, ii.line_total_gross FROM invoice_items ii JOIN invoices i ON ii.invoice_id = i.id WHERE i.invoice_number IN ('AN-2026-1857', 'AN-2026-1858', 'AN-2026-1861') ORDER BY i.invoice_number, ii.position;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 9NNjvn7NV7enobv.7ea640e70a8c --database YMZow7uQxpBVyBGbmbpvvd --execute SELECT i.invoice_number, ii.position, ii.description, ii.is_optional, ii.line_total_net, ii.line_total_gross FROM invoice_items ii JOIN invoices i ON ii.invoice_id = i.id WHERE i.invoice_number IN ('AN-2026-1857', 'AN-2026-1858', 'AN-2026-1861') ORDER BY i.invoice_number, ii.position;
